heading: Protection of uniform
label: 2707 Protection of uniform
text: The provisions of law relating to the protection of the uniform of the United States Army, Navy, or Marine Corps shall apply to the protection of the uniform of the Coast Guard, in the same manner, to the same extent, and under the same conditions.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 39 (, ).Aug. 29, 1916, ch. 418, § 139 Stat. 649The assimilation is made in general terms, rather than by reference to the applicable section in title 10, U.S.C., 1946 ed. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 484 of this title
